productName: Micro Bar Liquid Gold - Micro Bar Liquid Gold 1g - Zour Watermelon - 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries Zour Watermelon in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, a sweet, refreshing watermelon flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
